action.reasoning: Observation: SAKT got 0.7496 AUC, similar to DKT. Overfits quickly after epoch 5. Analysis: The transformer overfits this small dataset (2180 sequences). DKT-style LSTM with stronger regularization may work better. Decision: Switch back to LSTM-based DKT with dropout, train fewer epochs with early stopping. Also use larger embedding for skill+correct interaction.

python -c "import torch, json, os, logging; 
exec(open('train_v2.py').read())" || echo done
